sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap1 AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32), bitmap2 AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]), bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (2, bitmapBuild([]), bitmapBuild([1]));
SELECT id, bitmapHasAll(bitmap1, bitmap2) AS contains_all FROM test_bitmap;
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bitmap1 = bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4]) WHERE id = 1;
